templatestylesunlimited-fix-content-mode: Description of the FixContentModels maintenance script run through the command-line.
Summary used when the FixContentModels maintenance script changes a page's content model.

Output of the FixContentModels maintenance script when it is updating a page's content model. Parameters:
* $1 - name of the page being updated
Output of the FixContentModels maintenance script when it has finished updating content models.
